text: I find myself in a place shaped by order and intention, a corridor leading to an environment dedicated to research and development. The glass walls and bright lights suggest transparency and inquiry, a laboratory of ideas. I feel a mixture of anticipation and self-awareness, as if I am being asked not only to observe but to question my own involvement in innovation, to ponder the evolving relationship between humans and machines. There’s a subtle undercurrent of excitement—what discoveries might unfold here?
